data.markdown:
多平台同步功能太方便，电脑端修完手机端接着调色，云端存储永不丢失，旅行摄影师必备效率工具

nano banana的智能抠图功能太惊艳了！毛发级精度处理，连宠物胡须都能完美保留，一键生成透明背景省去90%手动时间

作为设计师，最头疼的证件照换底色被它3秒搞定，边缘零锯齿，发丝过渡自然，甲方再也没提过返工要求！

批量修图神器！同时处理200张产品图色彩统一，纳米级色差校准功能让我们的电商转化率直接提升15%

AI去水印功能堪称魔法，复杂背景下的文字水印都能无痕消除，修复后的图片完全看不出PS痕迹

人像精修模块绝了！自动识别五官并智能微调，保留个人特征的同时优化脸型，比传统液化工具自然十倍

实时预览功能超贴心，所有调整参数都能即时看到效果，再也不用像以前那样反复保存对比了

内置的智能构图建议拯救了我的摄影废片，自动分析黄金分割点，连我妈都夸我拍照技术突飞猛进

多平台同步功能太方便，电脑端修完手机端接着调色，云端存储永不丢失，旅行摄影师必备效率工具

nano banana的智能抠图功能太惊艳了！毛发级精度处理，连宠物胡须都能完美保留，一键生成透明背景省去90%手动时间

data.analysis: The website describes the features of 'nano banana', an image editing tool. It highlights several key functionalities that cater to various user needs, from professional photographers and designers to general users. The core value propositions revolve around AI-powered automation, precision, efficiency, and multi-platform synchronization.
key_findings: Multi-platform synchronization: Allows seamless editing across devices (PC and mobile) with cloud storage, preventing data loss. Useful for photographers.
Smart cutout: AI-powered, high-precision cutout tool (even for fine details like pet whiskers) that generates transparent backgrounds, saving significant manual effort.
ID photo background change: Quickly changes ID photo backgrounds with natural edges and hair transitions, eliminating rework for designers.
Batch image processing: Efficiently processes multiple images (e.g., 200 product photos) with consistent color and nano-level color difference calibration, boosting e-commerce conversion rates.
AI watermark removal: Magically removes watermarks from complex backgrounds without leaving traces, making edited images look natural.
Portrait retouching: AI-powered module that intelligently adjusts facial features while preserving individual characteristics, offering more natural results than traditional tools.
Real-time preview: Allows users to see the effects of adjustments instantly, eliminating the need for repeated saving and comparison.
Smart composition suggestions: Analyzes images for golden ratio points and provides composition advice, improving photo quality.
